creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
I'll close this as not a bug. Let's assume that I was careless in my earlier approaches to measurement.

Again, today, with iwlwifi(4) instead of iwm(4), a measured high (2.9 MB/s) that was reasonable. 

Reasonably close to the actual high (4.0 MB/s) for one of the package downloads that preceded the fastest_pkg measurement below.
